query: SELECT opl.versaoId, opl.categoriaId, opl.descricao, opl.mes_01, opl.mes_02, opl.mes_03, opl.total_trimestral FROM orcamento_planejado_linhas opl WHERE opl.empresaId IN (1, 660004) LIMIT 10;
